title: Dengue Protocol for Component Transfers
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: This protocol performs various transfers of...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs various transfers of 12 different components to create a master mix. The master mix is then distributed in 32 PCR tube strips. --- * [P300 single-channel GEN2 electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons Aluminum Blocks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/aluminum-block-set?_ga=2.44012454.2010707504.1610321113-1181961818.1604785212) ---

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
